## TRM1.1. Additional time in taxi-out phase (PI#4) {#trm1.1.-additional-time-in-taxi-out-phase-pi4 .Heading-2-TZ}

Lisbon and Porto are the only Portuguese airports subject to the monitoring of this indicator.

The additional time in Lisbon in 2025 increased to 4.55 min/dep, 6% above the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 4.29 min/dep (*using the new methodology*). This is the third highest value among airports subject to RP4 monitoring.

The additional time in Porto in 2025 was equal to 3.46 min/dep, very close to 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 3.37 min/dep (*using the new methodology*).

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 3.61 min/dep.
